title: Dercksen scoops ICC award
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Annerie Dercksen of the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Annerie Dercksen of the Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers received the International Cricket Council (ICC) award of Emerging Women's Cricketer of the Year for 2024 last Sunday.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Annerie Dercksen of the Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers received the International Cricket Council (ICC) award of Emerging Women's Cricketer of the Year for 2024 last Sunday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Beaufort West born-and-bred Dercksen was honoured at the annual ICC Awards for stand-out performances in the women's game.","html":"The Beaufort West born-and-bred Dercksen was honoured at the annual ICC Awards for stand-out performances in the women's game."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"With nine categories in total, Dercksen received the award ahead of Shreyanka Patil (India), Saskia Horley (Scotland) and Freya Sargent (Ireland)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An overwhelmed Dercksen said that she felt truly humbled and said it was a great honour to receive this accolade.","html":"An overwhelmed Dercksen said that she felt truly humbled and said it was a great honour to receive this accolade."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It is more than anything a reflection of the hard work and support of my team mates and coaches rather than myself,\" she said. \"I remain grateful and motivated to continue growing.\"","html":"\"It is more than anything a reflection of the hard work and support of my team mates and coaches rather than myself,\" she said. \"I remain grateful and motivated to continue growing.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 23-year-old all-rounder burst onto the international scene in January 2023 and has since represented the Proteas in all formats in two test matches, four one-day international test matches and 22 T20 international matches.","html":"The 23-year-old all-rounder burst onto the international scene in January 2023 and has since represented the Proteas in all formats in two test matches, four one-day international test matches and 22 T20 international matches."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dercksen, who participated in her second ICC T20 World Cup in 2024, was one of the heroes of the Proteas silver medal winners in the UAE-hosted event.","html":"Dercksen, who participated in her second ICC T20 World Cup in 2024, was one of the heroes of the Proteas silver medal winners in the UAE-hosted event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
